Church Planting Initiative

37.8715° N

Berkeley First

Bay Area Movement

Bay.

Sept 1 Launch

Planting

The Bay

Overview

A Bay Area church-planting and campus-ministry initiative beginning in Berkeley, then expanding to San Francisco, the Peninsula, San Jose, the Tri-Valley, and beyond.

Berkeley First → Bay Area Movement // Year 1 Goal $1M

Our Story

Berkeley First.

Stuart and Ashley Mains are leading a church-planting and campus-ministry initiative across the San Francisco Bay Area in partnership with the SF Bay Fellowship.

The first plant begins in Berkeley, building both campus ministry and a local church with a clear path to multiply across the region.

The vision is simple to understand and easy to join: tell the story, fund the work, and invite people to give, serve, pray, relocate, or join staff.

Expansion Roadmap

Berkeley to the Bay

Berkeley → SF → Peninsula → San Jose → Tri-Valley

Berkeley First

Launch the first planting in Berkeley with campus ministry and a local church working together from day one.

Phase 01

Launch Sept 1
No items found.

Across the Bay

Expand the movement into San Francisco and the Peninsula through pop-up services, relationships, and regional gatherings.

Phase 02

Regional Reach
No items found.

Beyond One City

Build toward San Jose, the Tri-Valley, and the wider Bay Area as new baptisms, staff, and families join the work.

Phase 03

Multi-Region
No items found.

Get Involved

Give. Serve. Relocate.

Join Staff

01

For staff couples, interns, and families considering a move to help plant in Berkeley and across the Bay.

For staff couples, interns, and families considering a move to help plant in Berkeley and across the Bay.

Serve Locally

02

Host, volunteer, support pop-up services, and help people find a clear next step into community.

Host, volunteer, support pop-up services, and help people find a clear next step into community.

Two flows matter most: follow the story clearly, then make giving or getting involved feel effortless.

Pray With Us

03

Join the prayer pipeline and receive focused requests as the launch and regional expansion develop.

Join the prayer pipeline and receive focused requests as the launch and regional expansion develop.

Give Monthly

04

Become part of a recurring supporter group that helps fund campus ministry, staff, and church planting.

Become part of a recurring supporter group that helps fund campus ministry, staff, and church planting.

Momentum

And Trust

“People give to people. This site keeps Stuart and Ashley’s calling clear, visible, and easy to support.”

5/5

Stuart & Ashley Mains
Planting Coordinators

“Berkeley is the first step, but the vision is regional — campus ministry, local church, and multiplication across the Bay.”

5/5

SF Bay Fellowship
Partner Church

“A monthly supporter pipeline gives the campaign a way to grow beyond one launch moment.”

5/5

Bay Builders
Recurring Partners

“The clearest path is simple: give, serve, pray, relocate, or join the planting staff.”

5/5

Get Involved
Pathways

“The Bay Area is central to the story. Geography, campuses, neighborhoods, and bridges all matter here.”
